reviews.review_text: This was the last  place we stayed on an 11 day campervan tour through Kakadu, Nitmiluk and Litchfield. We'd booked at the Wangi Falls camp ground,  which was hot and not very clean, so we bailed to this delightful place. Lovely campground, with lots of trees and greenery, brilliant showers, a nice pool, really friendly and helpful staff. Also good coffee ansld locally made ice creams. Convenient for the superb Florence Falls swimming hole. Of course, lots of flying insects at night, but it was the Northern Territory just after the wet season - nothing anyone can do about that. It was a really good finish to our tour.

Our little group of 5 (3 adults, 2 kids) absolutely loved our stay at Litchfield Tourist Park. Well setup cabins, conveniently located just out of the National Park, pool for the kids, good coffee for the parents! Highly recommend!

Hello,
Unfortunately, our car was stolen last night and cash inside the vehicle was also taken. The police across the entire town of Katherine are currently assisting us in tracking down the suspects.
Despite this being a serious and exceptional circumstance completely beyond our control, our request for a refund was refused. We were disappointed by the lack of flexibility and empathy shown in such a distressing situation.
We believe this matter deserved more understanding and a reasonable solution.
Thanks for your understanding.

Sehr schöner Campingplatz am Eingang zum Nationalpark. Die Plätze sind mit schönen Pflanzen umgeben, dies gibt einem das Gefühl mitten im Park zu sein.
Uns begrüsste eine sehr nette Dame, welche uns noch viele Tipps für die weiteren Tage gegeben hat. Auch im Verlauf des Aufenthaltes hat sie uns mehrfach freundlich begrüsst und sich erkundigt, ob noch etwas fehlt. Sie hat uns sogar angeboten unsere Wäsche bei regen ins trockene zu bringen. Wir haben uns sehr willkommen gefühlt und würden jederzeit wieder da buchen.

We had a very comfortable stay at Litchfield Tourist Park, a peaceful, family-run place ideally located at the gateway to Litchfield National Park. Our cabin was clean, spacious, and well-equipped with air conditioning, a comfortable bed, fridge, kettle, and basic utensils — perfect for a short, relaxing getaway. The nearby shared bathroom and toilet facilities were clean, well-maintained, and conveniently located, and the BBQ area attached to our cabin made outdoor meals easy and enjoyable. Surrounded by native trees and wildlife, the park had a calm and welcoming atmosphere. The only downsides were that there was no dedicated cooking area in our cabin, so we had to prepare breakfast on the BBQ, and there’s no phone reception or Wi-Fi. A small stove or shared cooking space would make the stay even more convenient, but overall it was a very pleasant and relaxing experience.
Rustic accommodation in a beautiful,  wild,  forest setting.  Staff couldn't be more helpful.

We stayed for two nights in powered campsites in this tropical garden paradise and wish we could have stayed longer! the property is visually stunning and well maintained. We stayed at the tail end of the dry season so barely saw anyone else around. Beautiful plants and wildlife all around and an easy drive to nearby attractions. would 100% recommend.

Super cool stay in one of the beautiful cabins. Quiet area and only about 10 km from Litchfield National Park. Definitely the nicest accommodation of my NT stay. I love little adventures and Australia. I also thought the radio system was cool. Never used it, though. Next time ;)

So impressed with this place. After staying at the very overpriced Accor hotel in Kakadu for 2 nights, I was very dark about NT. But this place restored by faith in the area. The owners are very passionate and invested. They have done a great job to make the property unique. They were very well organised and helpful. We stayed in cabin #2 and it had so much character and attention to detail. The grounds were beautiful and everything was immaculately maintained.

Really nice caravan park with friendly owners that gave us a lot of good info. We booked a cabin, which was very comfortable and had A/C that worked great even through the heat. It helped that it was underneath the shade!  There are a lot of wild birds on the property and we even saw some wallabies. The grounds are well maintained and planted with nice trees. There is laundry as well, including dryers. It's right next to Litchfield National Park, a super easy drive in to all the attractions.  We had a really nice time.

Le bungalow est super chouette, avec sa terrasse et son BBQ perso. L'emplacement est parfait pour visiter le national park.
La dame de l'accueil est très sympa et très pro.
Le bungalow est super chouette, avec sa terrasse et son BBQ perso. L'emplacement est parfait pour visiter le national park. |La dame de l'accueil est très sympa et très pro.
Would stay here again, kids loved it
We stayed in the powered site. very roomy and grassy.  Pleasant staff. And checked on our pooch during the day while we went off exploring.  Lovely clean facilities. We enjoyed our stay.

I stayed for 5 nights in a van and enjoyed a great visit.
The park is well run, clean and tidy. It also never felt crowded as it’s quite large. Plenty of toilets and showers which are also clean. Plenty of water pressure and great hot water.
I loved the pool especially of an evening as the temperature built up, nice and cooling!
It’s easy to get to all the features of the park from here.
Highly recommended!

Best bacon and egg muffins, oddly accompanied by the worst coffee in the NT.
Nearly asked for a refund on the coffees.
Great park. Nice and quiet. Amenities were clean and functional

Had 6 nights here and check out tomorrow!
Love love loved the van park. Their facilities of having the cafe there for breaky lunch is fab even though we only grabbed ice cream n milk n bread.
We were in a gorg grassy site on the corner of the block with the paddock in front of us and big expanse between our site and fence to paddock with cows & the odd pigs which we saw only tonight in there. Wallabies come out morn and evening and can have a heap of eyes looking at you from the park lawns as they come around the park, round the van sites its fabulous.
So very peaceful.
Pool is a great addition and lovely and refreshing. Other facilities around about the van park are in great working order, the grounds are kept lovely. Friendly and helpful staff.
2 huge days in Litchfield N.P were amazing. Loved it all esp the 4wd track to Surprise falls.
Thanks all

Based ourselves here while exploring Litchfield N.P.  We had a good site with all the amenities you could want. 3 shower amenities clean hot and good pressure. The pool was a very cool (bordering bloody cold) meeting place where a lot of people gathered for a chat and cool down. Fairly easy to get to all the attractions on that side of the park. A great park with reasonable prices.

Great large sites with shade, stayed 4 nights on a p/w site. Great location to see all Litchfield NP and has a great relaxed feel about the CP. Cafe & pool are great as are staff, unisex amenities clean. Thanks team, loved our stay. 🤙🤙
Great walks and swimming holes, intriguing microclimates, geological structures waterfalls all year birds and flowers

Staff extremely rude. Heaven forbid, Do not use the washing machine one minute past kerfew you’ll be abused by some cranky old lady.

“Caravan site”  about as flat as a mountain range.

Terrible experience.
Not enough toilets for the amount of people that were there sprinklers during the day it's annoying
A convenient distance from Litchfield. Spacious sites. Good privacy.
Staff are so friendly and welcoming! Great breaky. The sites are so green and lush. The best showers we’ve had in a while! Highly recommend for families traveling around the NT.

Kids rates this the best place we have stayed. Lots of grass and tree for the kids to play on. Fantastic shower and toilets and only 30-45 mins away from most swim holes.
Thanks for a great stay

We stayed in a double cabin with bathroom for 4 nights and found it perfect for our stay in Litchfield NP. Inside AC, a comfortable bed, good shower, fridge, microwave, tea and coffee making facilities and a TV. Outdoors a large semi private deck with table and chairs and a BBQ. On site swimming pool, small store and day time coffee shop. The camp is large with plenty of space for campers and caravans on powered and non powered sites. Right on the parks boundary making day tripping easy. No wifi, limited cell cover.
Lovely camp ground, staff are very friendly and accommodating, highly recommend

Wonderful place and great places to eat nearby.  We had a lovely cabin tucked away under some trees.  It was very quiet and peaceful (April).  The cabin was clean with everything we needed and nice outside sitting areas.  The staff were extremely helpful and cheerful and went out of their way to help us with a problem.  They couldn't have been better.  I would highly recommend this place to anyone wanting to stay in this area.
Fantastic outback experience.  Thoughtful and useful touches to make your stay great. We really enjoyed our cabin and made use of bbq on verandah.
A fantastic place to stay to explore Litchfield NP. We had a powered site for several days. All sites were shady and green. Will definitely be back to stay.
We absolutely love this place, we come here every year. The staff and atmosphere are just amazing.
Great place place 😃
Good place and spot! They have different areas for who  has kids, which  is amazing for a couple!  Highly recommended!

Beautiful cabin, but more importantly, we would like to thank the reception team and, in particular, Alice for her energy, enthusiasm, and knowledge of the local area. What an asset to the team. Wish we could have stayed longer as so much to see. Alice recommended the Lille Ripper for dinner, which was very good, and we saw every one of the tourist attractions she recommended with a map to boot. Thank you

A very good place and impeccable maintenance 👌. The toilets and showers were super clean, and the showers had impeccable water pressure. The shower head had an extremely water pressure that makes your shower a good moment. |The common areas were in very good condition
Excellent place, all facilities were in very good condition! The bathrooms were impeccable cleaned and the showers had a very good water pressure and thw head showers had a perfect water flow

Die Anlage ist ziemlich in die Jahre gekommen. Die alte Dame an der Rezeption war sehr unfreundlich zu uns und obwohl das ganze campsite lehr war haben wir den Platz nicht aussuchen können. Wurden hinten platziert weit weg vom Pool und Sanitärbereiche. Die waren auch sehr veraltet und nicht gereingt. Habe dort Kakalaken gesichtet. 🪳🪳🪳🤮.  Der Gäste Barbecue bereich ist auch sehr dürftig und lieblos gestaltet.
Später kam noch ein Camper so waren wir 2 Gäste und 2 Kabinen waren besetzt.
Der einzige Vorteil ist die Nähe zum Nationalpark.  Wir haben uns da nicht wohl gefühlt. Kann ich nicht weiterempfehlen.

Always a good stay at Litchfield Tourist Park, convenient to enter Litchfield NP, nice pool and great feel about the place. Although I was a little underwhelmed with The Homestead accommodation we booked for our two families. Pretty expensive for what it is. It’s tired, it was a little dirty and the bunk bedroom is not a separate room - it’s joined to the living area. Would book separate cabins next time.
Really peaceful and beautiful spot, kids love the big bath and the rocking chairs:))
Well run operation . Common shower with plenty hot water and toilets are clean.

We stayed for one night to visit the National park. It was during the start of the rainy season so pretty empty.

The people running the place are fabulous. Very friendly and super informative. The bungalow/cabin seemed ‘clean’ and tidy, but…

Unfortunately we didn’t sleep at all. We spent the night battling cockroaches. Four killed, the first of which climbed up my partner’s leg whilst cleaning dishes. Needless to say we couldn’t wait to leave in the morning and left before we could report our experience.

Locatie is super, dichtbij Litchfield NP. Vriendelijke ontvangst en goed ontbijt te verkrijgen.Als je met de camper of caravan komt ziet het er geweldig uit. Cabins kan ik niet beoordelen. Wij hadden de Doghouse omdat wij graag een eigen badkamer wilden en dit nog de enige beschikbare was. Doghouse ligt beetje afgelegen van het terrein, bij opslag, schuren. Doghouse zelf is zijn geld echt niet waard. Airco in zitgedeelte en slaapkamer; als deze aanslaat schud de hele cabin. Halletje en badkamer geen airco. Badkamer een verschrikkelijke rioollucht, dus deur goed dichthouden afzuiging constant aan en glazen over alle afvoerputjes. Snel douchen dus.
Good value for money. Friendly staff and the facilities are well cleaned. For cooking we use our own pan but everything was amazing. The pool is a plus to have after a long roadtrip.
Good spot to travel to the attractions toilets and showers average would stay again
Lovely shaded powered site, toilet/shower block out in the belting sun  an absolute hot house.

Campeggio vicino all’ingresso del Litchfield Park dotato anche di lodge.|La nostra cabina aveva due comode camere doppie, un cucinino e un bagno grandissimo con doppia doccia, interna ed esterna.|Grande terrazzo privato con barbecue per cuocere quanto ordinato alla reception.|Ottima colazione nel caffè del campeggio, che però non è aperto a cena.|Purtroppo la vicina cittadina di Batchelor offre pochissimo, altrimenti sarebbe davvero perfetto!

My 3 year old and I enjoyed a one night stay in the Retro Happy Campervan for my childs FIRST camping experience ! Was spacious, clean, and overall a vibe campervan experience!! Breakfast was delicious, coffee was good,staff are very friendly,  facilities were clean and accommodated for alot of campers. Quiet and peaceful at night 😃

This park is pet friendly   sites shady power and water available.  Staff at the caravan park will do regular checks on your pet, just ask at reception  while you visit the national Park. |Amenities are old but clean. There is also a Cafe on site for meals or coffee etc

A great spot to stay just near the National Park. Nice green grassed areas, well watered, with choice of shaded or open sites. Pleasant pool. Great staff with very nice coffee! Powered and unpowered sites available at good prices. Lot better than others nearby that have no shade or green areas.
Great spot to stay just outside National Park. Green grassed areas, good shaded or open sites. Very pleasant staff

This was such a beautiful little park to stay in.  Close to litchfield Park, you can go in and out, and it isn't too far to travel.  The anemities are fun as they are in a tin shed which can be moved if the area floods.  Hot showers, big sites, clean and tidy.

Amazing campsite with cabins available. We rented a cabin for 3 nights and moved every minute. Beds were so comfortable and sitting on the deck having a beer in the evening was so relaxing. The cabin had everything needed to cook meals also with a BBQ on the deck as well as a microwave inside. Toilet and shower facilities were immaculate and there’s an onsite cafe and off licence. The site is close to the national park and also the town of Batchelor where one can buy supplies and there also a great pub there. It’s also a short force to the rock pools and termite mounds of the national park. Didn’t want leave.

Quite a natural location, good sized fairly easily accessed sites. A good base to travel to the water holes and falls. The amenities are a bit basic in particular a block that includes a unisex shared group of showers.
Its quite a hot humid location with a tropical feel. We experienced a lot of biting insects around dusk and after dark.

One of our favourites, really in the thick of the action in Litchfield, not only dog friendly, you can leave your dog in your van and these guys do regular check ups at no extra cost, this is priceless when travelling with dogs paying for sitters and kennels regularly.
Highly recommended for a cabin stay. Clean, well appointed. Unusual layout but you have to consider the the living room is outside. Be ready to barbecue.

Lovely park surrounded by trees. Very dog friendly. Love the complimentary check your dog service allowing us to see the National park. Great coffee, clean amenities and the staff are chilled allowing  us to chill. On our favourites list.

We had two bungalows in The Litchfield Tourist Park for one night. The rooms had tv sets, dishes and a microwave but no stovetop. Also no internet. The restaurant in the park is not open for dinner but they were open for breakfast in the morning.

Great place to stay for a couple of nights or more. Pretty close to all the falls and springs the furtherest being 50 minutes. Great shady sites with lovely grass and pool was beautiful. Amenities were spotless and even portable amenities were good. Staff were fantastic and made the best toasties as well as an amazing curry we had for dinner. Even checked in on our dog while we were out at the falls.
Very convenient to Litchfield National Park. Large deck on the two bedroom cabin and love the outdoor shower.

I ride my motorcycle to the park most weekends & I have to share that the food & friendly service is second to none, would be great to get this sort of quality customer service more often in business. Thanks for the years of just being you , it works.

Had a fabulous 2 night stay in a Stockman's Cabin . Perfect for a couple. Great to have an ensuite (good water pressure, hot water plentiful)! Air con plus a fan kept us comfortable overnight. Satellite TV was good. Nowhere to put clothes but enough room to live out of two suitcases easily. A coat rack with a few hooks was available. Staff were really friendly and helpful. You are given a map to the park with everything highlighted: where you can and cannot swim etc. Extremely helpful. We had dinner in town the first night, breakfast on site the next morning(delicious) and ordered a BBQ pack to be delivered to our fridge while we were out exploring the National Park. The sausages, bread, butter, sauces were great. Unfortunately it wasn't mentioned that the chicken skewers were thigh- I would not have ordered if I had known this as I don't like thigh chicken meat. So they ended up in the bin however the rest was great. Don't leave any food out of the fridge- the ants will be there in a second! The supplies of the cabin (including insect spray)were appreciated! The pool was super warm but your body adjusted soon and it was delightful. Highly recommend this lovely Park, I'm sure we will be repeat customers again in the future! Good location to get to Litchfield Park.

Beautiful accomodation in a peaceful and serene setting, with wonderful service. The perfect stay for our family of 5 visiting Litchfield Reserve. Just 30 mins drive from Buley Rockhole which was our fave and very toddler friendly swimming hole.

We stayed in a large Ringers Cabin and had plenty of space for both the adults and children. The bath and outdoor shower were a treat and made our trip with toddlers very easy! The site is filled with big shady trees, making our stay very pleasant.

Toller Aufenthalt! Die Cabins sind sehr geräumig, sauber und gut ausgestattet. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich. Der Internetempfang war besser als erwartet. Idealer Ausgangspunkt um den Litchfield NP zu erkunden. Wir kommen gerne wieder!

Great shaded location, good home base to explore from, can't give it 5 stars because of the toilet and shower facilities near to us, could not use it at night, because its not fully enclosed so the bugs just come in and share the toilet with you, kitchen facilities appear to be closed or if not they are a mess.
Belles cascades, belles promenades. Une journée suffit pour découvrir le parc. Prévoir un deuxième jour si vous voulez visiter lost city et vous baigner dans les bassins formés par les chutes
Cabine familiale super confort et emplacement idéal ! Je recommande le petit déjeuner incroyable

We honestly loved our stay here. The Litchfield National Park so accessible, the cabin thoughtfully laid out, ours with a glorious picture above the bed of a Black Necked Stork, also named Jabiru (although that refers to a species in the Americas) with a written historical synopsis of Litchfield, so beautifully quiet and the grounds so well cared for 😀 thank you Shelly it was a pleasure. Sandy & Ursula (Stockmans No.5)

Great cabins, nice bbg at every cabin. Great stay, enjoyed it very much.
Only downside is that the breakfast starts very late
Place, staff, location… everything is awesome!!
Staff at the reception are exceptional very informative friendly & most welcoming. Lovely clean cabins enjoyed the comfortable stay

Beautiful caravan park
Has pool and can have breakfast and lunch there.
We had cabin 17 . Best cabin there complete with outdoor rain shower. Staff are super friendly and very helpful with advising best places to visit

Very clean and nicely maintained amenities within the caravan park.

Awesome coffee and the breakfast muffins are delicious.

Very friendly and accomodating staff.
I just st went to the pub
Lovely and clean, great service. Our meal was well priced and delicious. The restrooms were spotless.

Staff were so lovely and helpful and really helped make the decision where we should visit in litchfield.|Unfortunate the facilities were weird and uninviting. One shower and toilet block is a tin shed that is exposed to the elements at the top and bottom. The sun in the morning makes the showers feel like it’s 100 degrees. There is no soap to wash your hands either. The old block of showers and toilets is also exposed and so I worried about peeping Tom’s the whole time I showered . This old shower block also has minimal lights so we had to use our iPhone torch to shower at night time. The pool was lovely and clean. I don’t know if we would stay here again but it seems most of the accommodation this way may be a little odd.
Layout of park meant we either walked through someone's site ( staff suggest walking around hill through bush ) or drive to toilets. The park was ok and is close to Litchfield.

Most of staff rude, seems like they don’t want to be here
Very noisy overseas tourists behind us after 11pm for 2 nights, we had paid for 3 nights other than that would have left
Great location and grounds, lots of trees, love this park
Ablutions too far away from sites, beautiful showers and toilets close but no where to put clothing to change very clean

An excellent location to explore Litchfield from.

Campsites and shared facilities are clean and well maintained.

Cabins are ok for the price, be sure to ask for a non-smoking cabin if you don't like a smokey room smell.

At the time of this visit there is no wifi but they do have a Telstra 4g booster which is ok for basic access.
Lovely quiet and clean place.
Great if you want to be in the middle of the forest...no WiFi...🙄

We loved this Park. Perfect base to explore the National park. Super friendly, helpful and humorous staff to check us in. Our site was great. Camp kitchen good, pool was excellent. Amenities clean. Great cafe.

Good caravan park. We stay in tents at the unpowered sites at the back. Well maintained green grass and clean. Surrounded by pristine bushland and forest. Love the Wallabies and birds. Amenities are VERY clean, literally cleaned several times a day. Everything is very well maintained and spotless. Staff is friendly.

This us a great park on the fringe of Litchfield Park. The perfect park if you have a dog and if you're travelling with other people. We tagged teamed so our dog was never left alone. It's literally on the doorstep of the national park. Great amenities and very friendly and helpful staff. The only thing we found lacking a bit was the little pool. It was pretty full all day and no getting away from kids jumping in because we found it too small.

Camped there nice shady site
Clean park located just 20 minutes to litchfeild NP
Beautiful site with established trees. Caverns are top-quality cool and funky 😎
Our group stopped here for lunch on our way into Litchfield Park.   The staff were very friendly and provided great service.   The food was good and reasonably priced.   The amenities were clean.

Nette cabin met keuken, badkamer en veranda met BBQ. BBQ pakketten kun je boeken, maar wel een dag van te voren. Naast de cabins ook een grote camping. Alles was netjes, en het personeel vriendelijk en enthousiast. Lunch was prima (ook glutenvrij), en het is een goed plek om Litchfield National Park te verkennen. Wij reden vanuit deze accommodatie naar Darwin en hebben 4 watervallen meegepakt op de weg ernaartoe.
